{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"{"session_id":"","offset":10}","has_more":true,"total":1146},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7468207214870627096","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"写的非常好，也有创新，他平了我的意难平，特爱看，求你不要断更啊，之前我就爱看几本书结果通断更了，真的超好看，主要是磕cp。特甜，特香。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1738833051,"group_id":"7423263871793630232","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"ALL 最为精品，重度万人迷控","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NyS/dguI1YKiMjARRACYynkpMsvoqFwXTjQxIO/udloS","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/616d0357d2c740619ad272b4b6743f73~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776791760&x-signature=Qmm0IvnbsKE%2B0%2FfotMDxiPctCzs%3D","user_id":"1953211504928196","user_name":"阿念本念呀"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1953211504928196","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7423263871793630232","book_info":{"abstract":"叶鸣穿越到斩神世界，成了菩提老祖的代理人！
神墟【三教法会】，能言出法随！
开局习得大品天仙诀，力大无比、五感超神、悟性绝顶。
后又练成身外化身、法天象地……等诸般神通。
只要完成老祖给的考验，更是能融合老祖留在这个世界的化身，登顶至高。
老祖说：“此界，外神猖獗，当尽诛之！”
……
许久后，叶鸣经常卡神墟BUG，频频作死，老祖吹胡子瞪眼。
老祖：“独气气不如众气气。”
遂赠予方寸宝阁，阁中物品需气人才能获得。
自此，叶鸣在气人的道路上，一骑绝尘。
……
前情提要：
在本作里叶梵将一直当总司令到结局。
胖胖会跟莫莉，在后期会有所发展。
老祖会去病院见猴子，悟空三兄弟也将在林七夜的时代重逢……
更多精彩，邀您来看。
……
本书为斩神同人三部曲第一部。
第二部《斩神：我都至高了，系统你才来？》已完结，30万字+。
第三部《斩神：祖神起手，你管这叫野神？》已完结，47.6万字。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/5184431722e2d3c5631b4895378820d4","author":"提剑问书","author_id":"","book_id":"7423263871793630232","book_name":"斩神：方寸山行走，终结乱世源！","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#281818","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"3.5万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":1016,"name":"男频衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1016&name=男频衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":453,"name":"开局","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=453&name=开局&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":538,"name":"同人","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=538&name=同人&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1062,"name":"斩神衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1062&name=斩神衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1079,"name":"衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1079&name=衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7426387452169814553","read_count":"34953","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1099626"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.1","serial_count":"484","tags":"男频衍生,穿越,开局,同人,斩神衍生,衍生","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/ebee16eb9351b48ad26e2af255717538~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779441848&x-signature=tMIk2iLKxc2xGfVWvR5SWWRS8%2Fg%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"3117865139966531","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"214"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":1,"reply_show_row":3,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读4小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":8,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":277,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":15251,"reply_count":1," ow_pv":8565},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7529209292709397310","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"好看，超好看，虽然男主有点损，但是情节很有意思，不会无聊（温馨提示：不要在半夜看，会控制不住想笑）"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1753035819,"group_id":"7423263871793630232","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"单机日更30000字，不会作诗也会吟","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N7R1vVCHl+mM5OqOFmPK3xnNyawYzDOjuTQMJFoq9wRD","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/273118f7255d41e2802e4efb3de92966~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776795721&x-signature=fdt5qOTICtFoHNxAvSsgbKxTd7E%3D","user_id":"1931187508482743","user_name":"拥采"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1931187508482743","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7423263871793630232","book_info":{"abstract":"叶鸣穿越到斩神世界，成了菩提老祖的代理人！
神墟【三教法会】，能言出法随！
开局习得大品天仙诀，力大无比、五感超神、悟性绝顶。
后又练成身外化身、法天象地……等诸般神通。
只要完成老祖给的考验，更是能融合老祖留在这个世界的化身，登顶至高。
老祖说：“此界，外神猖獗，当尽诛之！”
……
许久后，叶鸣经常卡神墟BUG，频频作死，老祖吹胡子瞪眼。
老祖：“独气气不如众气气。”
遂赠予方寸宝阁，阁中物品需气人才能获得。
自此，叶鸣在气人的道路上，一骑绝尘。
……
前情提要：
在本作里叶梵将一直当总司令到结局。
胖胖会跟莫莉，在后期会有所发展。
老祖会去病院见猴子，悟空三兄弟也将在林七夜的时代重逢……
更多精彩，邀您来看。
……
本书为斩神同人三部曲第一部。
第二部《斩神：我都至高了，系统你才来？》已完结，30万字+。

ow_pv":71854},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_digg_time":1730383794,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7440058098587304766","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这是第一本不管有没有女主都想看下去的斩神同人。逻辑文笔真的好。当然希望还是无女主比较好！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1732277576,"group_id":"7423263871793630232","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N6DB+pc0o9lpgKHxpNcnWYohl6ILirSMtHPVbl+PV6Gk","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/4d76db0986da4e27af74c686e1f80fce~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776796605&x-signature=ffRcHHjqwv%2BPCKlpiie6LmHbndc%3D","user_id":"1416585573833102","user_name":"冰集"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1416585573833102","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7423263871793630232","book_info":{"abstract":"叶鸣穿越到斩神世界，成了菩提老祖的代理人！
神墟【三教法会】，能言出法随！
开局习得大品天仙诀，力大无比、五感超神、悟性绝顶。
后又练成身外化身、法天象地……等诸般神通。
只要完成老祖给的考验，更是能融合老祖留在这个世界的化身，登顶至高。
老祖说：“此界，外神猖獗，当尽诛之！”
……
许久后，叶鸣经常卡神墟BUG，频频作死，老祖吹胡子瞪眼。
老祖：“独气气不如众气气。”
遂赠予方寸宝阁，阁中物品需气人才能获得。
自此，叶鸣在气人的道路上，一骑绝尘。
……
前情提要：
在本作里叶梵将一直当总司令到结局。
胖胖会跟莫莉，在后期会有所发展。
老祖会去病院见猴子，悟空三兄弟也将在林七夜的时代重逢……
更多精彩，邀您来看。
……
